scripts_to_add_to_package_json.db:reset: node -e "require('pg').Pool({database:'postgres'}).query('DROP DATABASE IF EXISTS polyglot_os').then(()=>require('pg').Pool({database:'postgres'}).query('CREATE DATABASE polyglot_os')).then(()=>{console.log('Reset done');process.exit()})" && npm run db:setup && npm run db:seed
scripts_to_add_to_package_json.db:verify: node -e "const{Pool}=require('pg');const p=new Pool({database:'polyglot_os'});Promise.all(['languages','grammar_chapters','grammar_exercises','grammar_prompts','grammar_answers','sessions'].map(t=>p.query('SELECT COUNT(*)::int as c FROM '+t))).then(r=>{const n=['Languages','Chapters','Exercises','Prompts','Answers','Sessions'];r.forEach((v,i)=>console.log(n[i]+':',v.rows[0].c));p.end()})"

note: Merge into your existing package.json. Run: npm install pg
